chrom.description: A string specifying a chromosome of region to be plotted

chromstart.description: An integer start position on chromosome to be plotted

chromend.description: An integer end position on chromosome to be plotted

assembly.description: A string representing the default genome assembly or a plotgardener assembly object

fill.description: A character value, a vector, or a plotgardener colorby object specifying fill colors of range elements

linecolor.description: A character value, a vector, or a plotgardener colorby object specifying the color of the lines outlining range elements

order.description: A character value specifying how to order pileup data before assigning rows

collapse.description: A logical value indicating whether to collapse range elements into a single row, or into two rows if strandSplit = TRUE

boxHeight.description: A numeric or unit object specifying height of range element boxes

spaceWidth.description: A numeric value specifying the width of minimum spacing between range element boxes, as a fraction of the plot's genomic range

spaceHeight.description: A numeric value specifying the height of spacing between range element boxes on different rows, as a fraction of boxHeight

limitLabel.description: A logical value indicating whether to draw a "+" when not all elements can be plotted in the plotting space

strandSplit.description: A logical value indicating whether plus and minus-stranded elements should be separated

bg.description: A character value indicating background color

baseline.description: A logical value indicating whether to include a baseline along the x-axis

x.description: A numeric or unit object specifying ranges plot x-location

y.description: A numeric, unit object, or character containing a "b" combined with a numeric value specifying ranges plot y-location

width.description: A numeric or unit object specifying ranges plot width

height.description: A numeric or unit object specifying ranges plot height

just.description: A string specifying the justification of ranges plot relative to its (x, y) location

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if x, y, width, or height are only given as numerics

draw.description: A logical value indicating whether graphics output should be produced

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
